title: Red Snapper in Thai-Style Crust
description: A Thai-inspired dish featuring red snapper in a crispy crust, served with a side of garlic knots.
instructions: Season the red snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
In a bowl, mix together flour, garlic, fish sauce, lemon juice, chili flakes, cumin, and paprika.
Dredge the red snapper fillets in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Heat 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the red snapper fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the red snapper fillets to a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, bake the garlic knots in the oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve the red snapper fillets with garlic knots on the side.
